title: Fix Complete Assessment Button Submission

requirements.text: Fix the Complete Assessment button click handler in Section4.tsx to properly trigger the assessment submission process when clicked

quotes: Complete Assessment बटन पर click करते हैं तो बटन काम नहीं करता

acceptanceCriteria: Loading state is shown during submission
No console errors occur on button click

requirements.text: Ensure assessment data is successfully submitted to the Motoko backend via actor.submitAssessment() when Complete Assessment button is clicked

quotes: Complete Assessment बटन पर click करते हैं तो बटन काम नहीं करता

acceptanceCriteria: Assessment responses are sent to backend
Backend successfully stores the assessment data

requirements.text: After successful assessment submission, automatically navigate user to the Wellness Report page displaying their results

quotes: Assessment submit होने के बाद क्या होना चाहिए - Wellness Report

acceptanceCriteria: User is redirected to results/wellness report page after submission
Results page displays the calculated scores and analysis
Navigation occurs only after successful backend submission

requirements.text: Verify that submitted assessments appear in the Admin Dashboard after submission

quotes: Dashboard par submition ke baad show kare

acceptanceCriteria: Submitted assessment appears in admin dashboard table
Dashboard displays correct user data and scores
Data refresh shows newly submitted assessments without page reload

constraints: Do not modify the backend schema or main.mo actor structure
Preserve existing assessment scoring logic in scoringUtils.ts
Keep the four-section assessment flow intact
Do not change immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui
nonGoals: Redesigning the assessment UI or changing question content
Adding new assessment sections or questions
